subcodes.first_line: My Most Exalted Pen doth verily testify, and My All-Glorious Countenance, and My Sweetest Utterance, and all that is attributed unto God, the Sovereign [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اشهد قلمی الاعلی و منظری الابهی و بیانی الاحلی و کل ما ینسب الی الله مالک
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @chastisement and requital, @consolation and comfort, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
